description: CompositionCharcoal grey and white striped polo t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a ribbed collar and long sleeves, buttoned chest placket, a navy blue stripe across the chest, branding embroidered on the right chest and appliquéd on the left chest and a vented hemFitRegularWash careMachine wash inside out with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleach or wringTumble dry or flat dry in shadeWarm iron; Do not iron on decorationsDon that sporty look with ease with this polo t-shirt from wrangler. Crafted from a soft cotton fabric and designed for style, this tee offers exemplary comfort and is sure to become a wardrobe favourite. Team it with jeans and sports shoes.Model StatisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18”
